name: flutter-learn
description: Extracts patterns, best practices, and mistakes from development sessions to build a knowledge base of reusable solutions

purpose.overview: Analyzes your current development session history to identify recurring patterns, successful solutions, best practices, and mistakes. Extracts reusable widget patterns with code examples, categorizes them by type, assigns confidence scores, and stores them for future reference. Helps build a personalized knowledge base that grows with your experience.
useCases: Completing a feature to capture successful patterns
After solving a difficult problem to preserve the solution
At the end of a development session to extract learnings
After code reviews to capture best practices
When you want to update existing skills with new patterns
To identify anti-patterns and mistakes to avoid

minConfidence.description: Only show patterns with confidence score above threshold

suggestSkills.description: Generate suggestions for skill updates or new skill creation

list.description: List all stored patterns with confidence scores

show.description: Display details of a specific pattern

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project to analyze. If not provided, uses the current workspace directory.

bestPractices.defaultProjectLocalStorage: By default, patterns save to Claude's project-local directory: .claude/flutter-dev-assistant/patterns/
recommendedWorkflow: At end of each development session: /flutter-learn
Check all patterns in project: ls -la .claude/flutter-dev-assistant/patterns/
Commit patterns to version control: git add .claude/ && git commit -m 'chore: learn patterns from session'
keyAdvantages: All patterns stay within the project workspace
Can be committed to version control and shared with team
No dependency on user global config
Keeps Claude config separate from Kiro
bestPractices.centralizedLearning: All Flutter tools share patterns from .claude/flutter-dev-assistant/patterns/. Patterns grow over time within the project. High-confidence patterns can be promoted to official skills. Mistakes tracked to avoid repeating them. Best practices documented for team reference.

relatedCommands.description: Create checkpoints to track when patterns were applied
Verify code quality before extracting patterns
Use learned patterns in implementation planning

steps.name: Environment Detection
steps.description: Detects Flutter/FVM setup and platform (Claude Code vs Kiro)

steps.name: Session Analysis
steps.description: Analyzes current session history including code changes, conversations, and problem-solving approaches

steps.name: Pattern Identification
steps.description: Identifies recurring patterns and solutions that were successfully applied

steps.name: Widget Pattern Extraction
steps.description: Extracts reusable widget patterns with complete code examples and context

steps.name: Best Practice Identification
steps.description: Identifies best practices that were applied during the session

steps.name: Mistake Detection
steps.description: Identifies mistakes and anti-patterns that were corrected

steps.name: Categorization
steps.description: Categorizes patterns by type (performance, architecture, UI, state management, security)

steps.name: Confidence Scoring
steps.description: Assigns initial confidence score of 0.5 to newly extracted patterns

steps.name: Skill Suggestions
steps.description: If --suggest-skills flag used: Suggests updates to existing skills or creation of new skills based on learned patterns
